title: DIY SlimeVR Trackers
description: Build your own SlimeVR-compatible full-body trackers with OpenPaw Labs hardware, 3D-printed cases, and step-by-step assembly guides.

guides.description: Materials, tools, and a high-level walkthrough of every step in this project.
Walks the user through 3D printing all the components required for later guides.
Assemble the trackers — batteries, screws, and cases.
Assemble the charging dock for your trackers.
Optional guide for creating your own low-cost DIY straps.
One-time setup steps for your trackers in SlimeVR and VRChat.
Steps required in VRChat every time you use your trackers.
